rationale: Rehearsal-protected retry of the P2-B1 MCQ attempt. KEY: the prior negative (spec 1507d317) set rehearse_frac=0.2 but the construction path never read it — rehearsal was inert, and it trained only ~0.8 epoch (1500 steps / 1877 rows). Now rehearsal is wired: primary=qa_balanced_5k (1386 grounding rows, the skill that gives POPE bal-acc 68.3) with mcq (491) replayed in at frac 0.5 — which reproduces the SAME validated 1386:491 composition, isolating the lever to TRAINING BUDGET: 3 full epochs (~5631 steps) vs the prior under-trained 0.8 epoch. Tests whether the MCQ negative was under-training, not fundamental interference — does grounding-dominant replay over full epochs retain POPE while giving MCQ enough exposure to clear the MMBench floor?
